title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: A workflow that chains Claude Opus and Gemini 3.5 Flash for full-stack development: Opus performs planning and integration reasoning while Gemini 3.5 Flash generates frontends, with handoff documents between phases. The approach leverages Gemini's visual design quality and cost efficiency alongside Opus's reasoning strength.
